summary.en: EU public AC recharging points are subject to AFIR (Regulation (EU) 2023/1804) requirements for connector availability. AFIR Annex II specifies Type 2 for normal-power AC recharging points. IEC/EN 62196-2 describes the Type 2 technical connector design; the legal obligation is AFIR, while the IEC/EN standard is the technical specification route. Poland as an EU member state implements AFIR directly without national transposition, and the rapidly growing Polish EV infrastructure market means Type 2 compliance is increasingly enforced at both public and private commercial charging sites.
summary.zh: 欧盟公共交流充电点受AFIR（法规（EU）2023/1804）关于接口可用性的要求约束。AFIR附件II规定普通功率交流充电点采用Type 2。IEC/EN 62196-2描述Type 2接口的技术设计；法律义务来自AFIR，IEC/EN标准是技术规格路径。波兰作为欧盟成员国直接实施AFIR，无需国家转化立法，且波兰电动汽车基础设施市场快速增长，使得Type 2合规在公共和私营商业充电站均得到日益严格的执行。
summary.zht: 歐盟公共交流充電點受AFIR（法規（EU）2023/1804）關於接口可用性的要求約束。AFIR附件II規定普通功率交流充電點採用Type 2。IEC/EN 62196-2描述Type 2接口的技術設計；法律義務來自AFIR，IEC/EN標準是技術規格路徑。波蘭作為歐盟成員國直接實施AFIR，無需國家轉化立法，且波蘭電動汽車基礎設施市場快速增長，使得Type 2合規在公共和私營商業充電站均得到日益嚴格的執行。

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.2 for AC charging, which defines a physically distinct 7-pin connector incompatible with IEC Type 2. GB/T plugs cannot mate with EU Type 2 sockets.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电采用GB/T 20234.2标准，定义了与IEC Type 2物理上不兼容的7针接口。GB/T插头无法与欧盟Type 2插座配合使用。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電採用GB/T 20234.2標準，定義了與IEC Type 2物理上不相容的7針接口。GB/T插頭無法與歐盟Type 2插座配合使用。

gap.en: Hardware connector is physically incompatible. A Chinese EV or EVSE designed only around a GB/T AC interface cannot interoperate with EU/Polish public Type 2 AC infrastructure without a physical inlet/socket and control-interface redesign. The connector body, pin count, and locking mechanism all differ. Any adapter strategy for public infrastructure must be checked against AFIR and Polish safety rules rather than treated as a substitute for compliant connector design. Poland's active AFIR implementation means Type 2 is mandatory at all in-scope public AC charging points.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容。仅围绕GB/T交流接口设计的中国电动汽车或充电设备，在未重新设计物理插座/接口及控制接口的情况下，无法与欧盟/波兰公共Type 2交流基础设施互操作。接口外形、针脚数量及锁定机构均不相同。公共基础设施中的任何转接方案均须按AFIR及波兰安全规则核查，不能视为合规接口设计的替代。波兰积极实施AFIR，意味着所有适用范围内公共交流充电点均须强制配备Type 2。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容。僅圍繞GB/T交流接口設計的中國電動汽車或充電設備，在未重新設計物理插座/接口及控制接口的情況下，無法與歐盟/波蘭公共Type 2交流基礎設施互操作。接口外形、針腳數量及鎖定機構均不相同。公共基礎設施中的任何轉接方案均須按AFIR及波蘭安全規則核查，不能視為合規接口設計的替代。波蘭積極實施AFIR，意味著所有適用範圍內公共交流充電點均須強制配備Type 2。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR requirements for publicly accessible AC recharging points, including Type 2 availability as specified in Annex II. AFIR is directly applicable in Poland as an EU Regulation. IEC/EN 62196-2 is the voluntary technical connector standard/specification used to implement that legal requirement; it is not the legal obligation by itself.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.2 required for EV sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Non-compliant for EU/Polish public charging interoperability as-is if the product only supports GB/T AC. EU public AC infrastructure must meet AFIR connector requirements, and IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2 is the technical specification used for that route. GB/T AC interfaces are not a substitute for AFIR-compliant Type 2 compatibility. This gap applies throughout Poland as AFIR is directly applicable without national transposition.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品仅支持GB/T交流接口，则就欧盟/波兰公共充电互操作性而言现状不合规。欧盟公共交流基础设施须满足AFIR接口要求，IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2是该路径采用的技术规格。GB/T交流接口不能替代符合AFIR要求的Type 2兼容性。该差距在整个波兰均适用，因为AFIR无需国家转化立法即直接适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品僅支援GB/T交流接口，則就歐盟/波蘭公共充電互操作性而言現狀不合規。歐盟公共交流基礎設施須滿足AFIR接口要求，IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2是該路徑採用的技術規格。GB/T交流接口不能替代符合AFIR要求的Type 2相容性。該差距在整個波蘭均適用，因為AFIR無需國家轉化立法即直接適用。

requirement_topic.zh: 直流快充接口标准（CCS Combo 2）
requirement_topic.zht: 直流快充接口標準（CCS Combo 2）

summary.en: EU public DC recharging points are subject to AFIR (Regulation (EU) 2023/1804) requirements for connector availability. AFIR Annex II specifies Combo 2 for high-power DC recharging points. IEC/EN 62196-3 describes the CCS Combo 2 technical connector design; the legal obligation is AFIR, while the IEC/EN standard is the technical specification route. Poland's growing motorway and urban DC fast-charging network is being built to AFIR Combo 2 requirements.
summary.zh: 欧盟公共直流充电点受AFIR（法规（EU）2023/1804）关于接口可用性的要求约束。AFIR附件II规定高功率直流充电点采用Combo 2。IEC/EN 62196-3描述CCS Combo 2接口的技术设计；法律义务来自AFIR，IEC/EN标准是技术规格路径。波兰不断扩张的高速公路和城市直流快充网络正按AFIR Combo 2要求建设。
summary.zht: 歐盟公共直流充電點受AFIR（法規（EU）2023/1804）關於接口可用性的要求約束。AFIR附件II規定高功率直流充電點採用Combo 2。IEC/EN 62196-3描述CCS Combo 2接口的技術設計；法律義務來自AFIR，IEC/EN標準是技術規格路徑。波蘭不斷擴張的高速公路和城市直流快充網路正按AFIR Combo 2要求建設。

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.3 for DC fast charging, defining a physically distinct 9-pin connector (CHAdeMO-influenced design) incompatible with CCS Combo 2. The pin layout, communication protocol (CAN vs. PLC), and inlet shape all differ.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3标准，定义了与CCS Combo 2物理上不兼容的9针接口（受CHAdeMO影响）。针脚布局、通信协议（CAN与PLC）及接口外形均不相同。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3標準，定義了與CCS Combo 2物理上不相容的9針接口（受CHAdeMO影響）。針腳佈局、通訊協定（CAN與PLC）及接口外形均不相同。

gap.en: Hardware connector is physically incompatible. Chinese EVs or EVSE with only a GB/T DC interface cannot fast-charge at EU/Polish CCS2 public stations without hardware and communication-stack redesign. The vehicle/charger communication stack (GB/T 27930 CAN vs. ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC pathways in common EU CCS practice) also differs, compounding the incompatibility beyond the physical plug. Any adapter strategy for public infrastructure must be checked against AFIR and Polish safety rules. Poland's expanding motorway charging network mandates Combo 2.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容。仅配备GB/T直流接口的中国电动汽车或充电设备，在未重新设计硬件及通信协议栈的情况下，无法在欧盟/波兰CCS2公共快充站充电。车辆/充电设备通信协议（GB/T 27930 CAN与欧盟CCS实践中常见的ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC路径）也不同，进一步加剧了插头之外的不兼容性。公共基础设施中的任何转接方案均须按AFIR及波兰安全规则核查。波兰不断扩展的高速公路充电网络强制要求Combo 2。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容。僅配備GB/T直流接口的中國電動汽車或充電設備，在未重新設計硬件及通訊協議棧的情況下，無法在歐盟/波蘭CCS2公共快充站充電。車輛/充電設備通訊協定（GB/T 27930 CAN與歐盟CCS實務中常見的ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC路徑）也不同，進一步加劇了插頭之外的不相容性。公共基礎設施中的任何轉接方案均須按AFIR及波蘭安全規則核查。波蘭不斷擴展的高速公路充電網路強制要求Combo 2。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR requirements for publicly accessible high-power DC recharging points, including Combo 2 availability as specified in Annex II. AFIR is directly applicable in Poland. IEC/EN 62196-3 is the voluntary technical connector standard/specification used to implement that legal requirement; it is not the legal obligation by itself.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.3 required for DC fast-charge EV sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Non-compliant for EU/Polish public DC charging interoperability as-is if the product only supports GB/T DC. EU public DC infrastructure must meet AFIR connector requirements, and IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 is the technical specification used for that route. GB/T DC interfaces are not a substitute for AFIR-compliant Combo 2 compatibility. Poland's motorway and urban fast-charging expansion mandates Combo 2 compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品仅支持GB/T直流接口，则就欧盟/波兰公共直流充电互操作性而言现状不合规。欧盟公共直流基础设施须满足AFIR接口要求，IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2是该路径采用的技术规格。GB/T直流接口不能替代符合AFIR要求的Combo 2兼容性。波兰高速公路和城市快充扩展项目强制要求Combo 2合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品僅支援GB/T直流接口，則就歐盟/波蘭公共直流充電互操作性而言現狀不合規。歐盟公共直流基礎設施須滿足AFIR接口要求，IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2是該路徑採用的技術規格。GB/T直流接口不能替代符合AFIR要求的Combo 2相容性。波蘭高速公路和城市快充擴展項目強制要求Combo 2合規。

requirement_topic.en: Legal Mandate: AFIR vs. AFID and Transition Timeline
requirement_topic.zh: 法律依据：AFIR与AFID及过渡时间表
requirement_topic.zht: 法律依據：AFIR與AFID及過渡時間表

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR) replaced Directive 2014/94/EU (AFID) with binding targets. AFIR entered into force 13 April 2024. New public charging pools must comply from that date; all existing pools must be upgraded to Type 2 / CCS2 by 2025–2026 depending on power level. AFIR is directly applicable in all EU member states without transposition, including Poland. Poland's national EV infrastructure plans and EU co-funded AFIR deployment targets accelerate the transition.
summary.zh: 欧盟法规2023/1804（AFIR）以具有约束力的目标取代了2014/94/EU指令（AFID）。AFIR于2024年4月13日生效。新建公共充电站须自该日期起符合要求；现有充电站须于2025-2026年（依功率等级而定）完成升级，配备Type 2/CCS2接口。AFIR在包括波兰在内的所有欧盟成员国直接适用，无需转化立法。波兰的国家电动汽车基础设施规划及欧盟共同资助的AFIR部署目标加速了这一过渡进程。
summary.zht: 歐盟法規2023/1804（AFIR）以具有約束力的目標取代了2014/94/EU指令（AFID）。AFIR於2024年4月13日生效。新建公共充電站須自該日期起符合要求；現有充電站須於2025-2026年（依功率等級而定）完成升級，配備Type 2/CCS2接口。AFIR在包括波蘭在內的所有歐盟成員國直接適用，無需轉化立法。波蘭的國家電動汽車基礎設施規劃及歐盟共同資助的AFIR部署目標加速了這一過渡進程。

summary.en: China's equivalent policy mandate is GB/T 20234 series (enforced via MIIT type-approval). No bilateral connector recognition or mutual acceptance agreement exists between China GB/T and EU IEC 62196 standards. (Confirmed: no bilateral connector or certification mutual recognition treaty between CN GB/T 20234 and EU IEC 62196 has been concluded as of June 2026.)
summary.zh: 中国对应的政策强制要求为GB/T 20234系列（通过工信部型式认证执行）。中国GB/T标准与欧盟IEC 62196标准之间不存在双边接口互认或相互接受协议。（已确认：截至2026年6月，中国GB/T 20234与欧盟IEC 62196之间未签订双边接口或认证互认条约。）
summary.zht: 中國對應的政策強制要求為GB/T 20234系列（通過工信部型式認證執行）。中國GB/T標準與歐盟IEC 62196標準之間不存在雙邊接口互認或相互接受協議。（已確認：截至2026年6月，中國GB/T 20234與歐盟IEC 62196之間未簽訂雙邊接口或認證互認條約。）

gap.en: No harmonisation or mutual recognition between GB/T and IEC 62196 series. AFIR is a binding EU Regulation (not a Directive), meaning no member-state flexibility to accept GB/T connectors, including Poland. Any EV or EVSE destined for the Polish/EU market must carry Type 2 (AC) and CCS Combo 2 (DC) inlets as a hard market-entry requirement under AFIR.
gap.zh: GB/T与IEC 62196系列之间不存在协调或互认机制。AFIR是具有约束力的欧盟法规（而非指令），包括波兰在内的成员国无权自行接受GB/T接口。任何面向波兰/欧盟市场的电动汽车或充电设备，必须配备Type 2（交流）和CCS Combo 2（直流）充电接口，这是AFIR规定的进入市场的硬性要求。
gap.zht: GB/T與IEC 62196系列之間不存在協調或互認機制。AFIR是具有約束力的歐盟法規（而非指令），包括波蘭在內的成員國無權自行接受GB/T接口。任何面向波蘭/歐盟市場的電動汽車或充電設備，必須配備Type 2（交流）和CCS Combo 2（直流）充電接口，這是AFIR規定的進入市場的硬性要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR is directly applicable across EU member states including Poland from 13 April 2024 for in-scope publicly accessible recharging infrastructure. IEC/EN 62196 connector standards are technical specifications referenced/used to implement AFIR connector requirements, not standalone legal obligations.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestically; no reciprocal obligation on EU/Polish side to accept GB/T

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Non-compliant as-is for EU/Polish public charging infrastructure where a product relies on Chinese GB/T connectors only. AFIR creates the binding EU obligation for in-scope public infrastructure in Poland; Type 2 / Combo 2 technical compatibility is the practical redesign item. This is a product and infrastructure interoperability gap, not merely a documentation gap.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品仅依赖中国GB/T接口，则就欧盟/波兰公共充电基础设施而言现状不合规。AFIR为波兰适用范围内公共基础设施建立具有约束力的欧盟义务；Type 2 / Combo 2技术兼容性是实际产品重新设计事项。这是产品及基础设施互操作差距，而非单纯文件缺失。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品僅依賴中國GB/T接口，則就歐盟/波蘭公共充電基礎設施而言現狀不合規。AFIR為波蘭適用範圍內公共基礎設施建立具有約束力的歐盟義務；Type 2 / Combo 2技術相容性是實際產品重新設計事項。這是產品及基礎設施互操作差距，而非單純文件缺失。
